notes.sg-family-medicine: Family medicine is a clinical specialty, not a subfield of pharmacology.
notes.sg-physical-therapy: Physical therapy is a clinical specialty, not a subfield of pharmacology.
notes.sg-environmental-health: Environmental health is a public health discipline, not a subfield of pharmacology.
notes.sg-public-health: Public health is a broad discipline that encompasses many areas, but it is not a direct subfield of pharmacology.
